description: 15-day odd first period on Wikipedia $200k/30yr/6.5% — APR pushed slightly above 6.50%.

expected.note: D-24: engine-emitted value pinned at first compute (Phase 4 04-06 idiom). Engine produces 0.065002 in 2 Newton iterations under MONEY_CONTEXT.prec=28. The (1+f*i) factor on the first payment with f=0.5 (15 days odd / 30-day unit period) increases the first payment's PV contribution, requiring a slightly higher i to balance the U-equation; APR > 6.50% nominal as required by Plan 07-03 sign-flip detector. Plan 07-03 SUMMARY (Rule-1 informational) corrected RESEARCH §Q(e)'s back-of-envelope ~6.523% forecast which was off by ~100x in magnitude — the actual bump is +0.0002 percentage points, not +0.023. Wave 7 will cross-validate against HMDA Platform per CONTEXT D-09.
